skills.description: Deep privacy compliance — Consent Mode v2, pre-consent firing, tag-level consent mapping, PII scan, GDPR/CCPA/DMA regional compliance
Container governance — tag/trigger/variable naming convention, folder organization, consistency analysis, maintainability scoring
Cross-platform measurement — event parity matrix, destination data validation per platform, remarketing gaps, enhanced conversions, attribution gaps
Data layer architecture — variable inventory, ecommerce schema compliance, data flow tracing, Custom JS audit, timing/race conditions
Comprehensive container health — tag sequencing, page performance metrics, paused/redundant detection, destination platform validation, folder organization
Environment & workspace hygiene — prod/staging/dev environment bleed detection, versioning discipline, container ownership, complete tool inventory, bloat assessment
Tag inventory & hygiene — complete tag audit, legacy/UA tag detection, duplicate tag identification, GA4 implementation quality, hardcoded values, event-to-business mapping
SPA & modern framework handling — history change detection, double-firing prevention, page path/title accuracy on virtual navigation, scroll/engagement reset, framework detection
Advertising platform readiness — Google Ads/Meta/LinkedIn/TikTok tag validation, conversion integrity check, remarketing signal quality, duplicate conversion prevention
Performance & error handling — tag firing order impact, Custom HTML audit with estimated load times, blocking script detection, error-prone pattern identification, performance scoring
Professional resume review — clarity, impact, ATS compatibility, formatting
